title: HBM Steamy
description: HBM: Alcater Edition, but with a slight hue of QoL
body:
What once used to be a pack centered around interaction between S&R:P and HBM, is now just an HBM with QoL pack. There really isn't much to say about it for now. Likely to be maintained for the "Steam Group" down the line. Mod credits:
  • Just Enough Items by mezz
  • Inventory Tweaks by Jimeo Wan, Kobata
  • Baubles by Azanor
  • AppleSkin by squeek
  • Pam's HarvestCraft by Pamela Collins
  • Xaero's World Map by Xaero96
  • Xaero's Minimap by Xaero96
  • Mouse Tweaks by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
  • Blockcraftery by Elucent, EpicSquid
  • Wall-Jump! by genandnic
  • Comforts by C4
  • CodeChicken Lib by ChickenBones, covers1624
  • FoamFix by asiekierka
  • Forge Multipart CBE by ChickenBones
  • Mystical Lib by EpicSquid, Elucent
  • HBM's Nuclear Tech - Extended Edition by Alcater, Drillgon200, HBMMods/The Bobcat
  • Surge by Darkhax, Jaredlll08, lclc98
  • Attribute Fix by darkhax
  • Controlling by Jaredlll08
  • Fullscreen Windowed by Hancin
  • The Lost Cities Squared by McJty
  • Let Me Sleep by Fuzs
  • FastFurnace by Shadows_of_Fire
  • SecurityCraft by Geforce, bl4ckscor3, Redstone_Dubstep
  • CosmeticArmorReworked by zlainsama
  • CTM by tterrag, Drullkus, minecreatr
  • CraftTweaker2 by StanHebben, Jaredlll08
  • Tomb Many Graves by M4thG33k, Tiffit
  • Improved Backpacks by DreenDex, _Socol_
  • Cooking for Blockheads by BlayTheNinth
  • Spark Unforged by Luck, fonnymunkey
  • Placebo by Shadows_of_Fire
  • Fast Leaf Decay by Olafski
  • FastWorkbench by Shadows_of_Fire
  • Quark by Vazkii, wiiv
  • AutoRegLib by Vazkii
olafskiii, your request for being credited for Fast Leaf Decay was heard :P (will be really awkward if I happened to miss a couple requests like this)
